zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Wavrin於大約1217年出生在法國諾爾德瓦福林時，她的父親Robert II de Wavrin5歲，母親Mathilde De Bethune1歲。她於1237年與Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Wavrin于大约1217年出生在法国諾爾德瓦福林时，她的父亲Robert II de Wavrin5岁，母亲Mathilde De Bethune1岁。她于1237年与Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wavrin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Wavrin was born about 1217, in Wavrin, Nord, France, her father, Robert II de Wavrin, was 5 and her mother, Mathilde De Bethune, was 1. She married Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke in 1237. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Wavrin est née environ 1217, à Wavrin, Nord, France, son père, Robert II de Wavrin, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Mathilde De Bethune, avait 1 ans. Elle a épousé Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke en 1237. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Wavrin um 1217 in Wavrin, Nord, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert II de Wavrin 5 und ihre Mutter Mathilde De Bethune 1. Sie hat 1237 Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Wavrin è nata il circa 1217 nel Wavrin, Nord, Francia, sua padre, Robert II de Wavrin, aveva 5 anni e sua madre, Mathilde De Bethune, aveva 1 anni. Lei sposato Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke nel 1237. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Wavrinが約1217年にフランスノードワvリンで生まれた時，父Robert II de Wavrinは5歳，母Mathilde De Bethuneは1歳であった。1237年にRaas VII de Gavere van Liedekerkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Wavrin(이)가 대략 1217년 프랑스 노르드 와브린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert II de Wavrin(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde De Bethune(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 1237년 Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Wavrin nasceu aproximadamente 1217, em Wavrin, Nord, França, seu pai, Robert II de Wavrin, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde De Bethune, tinha 1 anos. Ela casou-se com Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke em 1237. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Wavrin родилась около 1217 г. в местности ваврин, норд, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert II de Wavrin было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde De Bethune, 1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke в 1237 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Wavrin nació aproximadamente 1217, en Wavrin, Nord, Francia, su papá, Robert II de Wavrin, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Mathilde De Bethune, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Raas VII de Gavere van Liedekerke en 1237. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
